segments.text: my heart's desire and prayer to God for Israel is, that they might be saved
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: I bear them record that
they have a zeal of God, but not according to knowledge
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For
they being ignorant of God's righteousness, and going about to establish their own righteousness, have not submitted themselves unto the righteousness of God
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For
Christ is the end of the law for righteousness to every one that believeth
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For Moses describeth the righteousness which is of the law
That the man which doeth those things shall live by them
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: But the righteousness which is of faith speaketh on this wise
Say not in thine heart, Who shall ascend into heaven?
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: (that is, to bring Christ down from above:)
Or, Who shall descend into the deep?
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: (that is, to bring up Christ again from the dead.)
But what saith it?
The word is nigh thee, even in thy mouth, and in thy heart: that is, the word of faith, which we preach
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: That if thou shalt confess with thy mouth the Lord Jesus, and shalt believe in thine heart that God hath raised him from the dead, thou shalt be saved
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For with the heart man believeth unto righteousness; and with the mouth confession is made unto salvation
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For the scripture saith
Whosoever believeth on him shall not be ashamed
segments.speaker: Scripture

segments.text: For there is no difference between the Jew and the Greek: for the same Lord over all is rich unto all that call upon him
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For whosoever shall call upon the name of the Lord shall be saved
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: How then shall they call on him in whom they have not believed? and how shall they believe in him of whom they have not heard? and how shall they hear without a preacher?
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And how shall they preach, except they be sent? as it is written, How beautiful are the feet of them that preach the gospel of peace, and bring glad tidings of good things!
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: But they have not all obeyed the gospel. For Esaias saith
Lord, who hath believed our report?
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: So then faith cometh by hearing, and hearing by the word of God
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: But I say, Have they not heard? Yes verily, their sound went into all the earth, and their words unto the ends of the world
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: But I say, Did not Israel know? First Moses saith
I will provoke you to jealousy by them that are no people, and by a foolish nation I will anger you
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: But Esaias is very bold, and saith
I was found of them that sought me not; I was made manifest unto them that asked not after me
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: But to Israel he saith
All day long I have stretched forth my hands unto a disobedient and gainsaying people
segments.speaker: God
